prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this! Taking the first step is often the hardest part, but you're building momentum by getting started. Think about how accomplished you'll feel once you dive in and make progress. 

Break down the task into smaller, manageable chunks if it feels overwhelming. Set a timer if that helps you stay focused and motivated. Remember, you don't have to complete everything in one go; steady progress will get you there. Believe in your abilities, and don't forget to take breaks to recharge. You're capable of more than you realize! Now, go ahead and begin; the sooner you start, the sooner you'll finish!
